name: @kolm/itkv-worker
description: W722/W633 - isolated kolm Importance-Tiered KV Cache (ITKV) worker. Thin Node shell spawns the stdlib Python tier-classifier; optional workers/itkv/requirements.txt installs kvpress/transformers/hqq for the KV policy sidecar. Root kolm install stays light.

python.note: Default tier selector is python3 workers/itkv/scripts/itkv.py and uses only the Python stdlib. Optional KV policy runtime sidecar lives at workers/itkv/scripts/kvpolicy.py; install workers/itkv/requirements.txt in an isolated worker env for kvpress/transformers/hqq. Override tier selection via $ITKV_TIER_CMD (single command or JSON array form, e.g. ITKV_TIER_CMD='["node","stub.js"]').
